title: Just Another Blonde
writer: Gerald Beaumont, Paul Schofield, George Marion Jr.
actors: Dorothy Mackaill, Jack Mulhall, Louise Brooks
plot: Jimmy O'Connor and Scotty are a couple of New York City gamblers and sharpies who decide to go straight and, since they are such good friends, split 50-50 "even steven" on anything they get or do. Jimmy, a confirmed bachelor, does...
